nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: Anne ? was born in 1330, in England, United Kingdom. She married John de Heriez in 1350, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Preston Patrick, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne ?(은)는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Heriez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 프레스턴 패트릭에서 사망했다.
